title: Count on Me
why_this_song: Friendship-themed with first-conditional structures and the idiom 'count on someone'. Very clear diction — Bruno Mars enunciates every syllable.

vocab_hooks.note: phrasal verb — central to the song

grammar_callouts: first conditional: If you ever X, I'll Y

exercises.prompt_en: Fill the blank in this line:

exercises.excerpt: I'll sail the world to find you
exercises.teacher_note: Auto-generated from synced lyrics — add the model translation when reviewing.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Count on Me" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Count on Me" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Match each English word or phrase to its Portuguese meaning.
exercises.prompt_pt: Associe cada palavra ou expressão em inglês ao significado em português.

exercises.prompt_en: Put the words in the right order:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque as palavras na ordem certa:

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "count" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "count" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: And I know when I need it
We'll find out what we're made of

teaching_notes_md: **Pedagogy:** The counting (one, two, three) reinforces basic numbers for A1.1. The first-conditional refrain gives four clean reps in 3 minutes.
copyright_notice: Lyrics are property of Warner Chappell Music. Only short educational excerpts reproduced here under Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII and US fair-use doctrine.

lines: And I know when I need it
I can count on you like 4, 3, 2, and you'll be there
'Cause that's what friends are supposed to do, oh, yeah
If you ever find yourself stuck in the middle of the sea
I'll sail the world to find you
